summary: Backend API testing completed for category selection and editing feature. All 21 tests passed. This is a React Native/Expo mobile app, so Playwright UI testing is not applicable - frontend was reviewed via code analysis.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are properly implemented
Backend: AddCategoryRequest and UpdateCategoryRequest models correctly include description field
Backend: POST /api/categories/select correctly validates minimum 3 categories
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/categories/{id} correctly handles description updates (including clearing)
Backend: GET /api/categories returns categories with description field
Frontend: onboarding.tsx displays category descriptions and pre-populates selections for edit mode
Frontend: feed.tsx has 'Edit Categories' option in settings modal
Frontend: index.tsx correctly routes new users to /onboarding

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native app, code review only

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing categories from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Backend APIs tested via pytest. All category selection and editing features work correctly. Categories in DB have descriptions (e.g., CHESS has 'Mate in 2 Puzzles', Cricket has 'Test your cricket knowledge'). User model has selected_categories and onboarding_complete fields that are properly updated when categories are selected.

features_verified.POST /api/categories/select: Working - saves user preferences, enforces min 3 categories, sets onboarding_complete=true
features_verified.GET /api/categories: Working - returns categories with descriptions, requires auth
features_verified.PATCH /api/admin/categories/{id}: Working - can update description/icon/color, validates inputs, requires admin auth
features_verified.User onboarding fields: Working - selected_categories and onboarding_complete fields present and updated correctly
features_verified.Frontend onboarding screen: Code verified - shows descriptions, pre-populates selections for edit mode
features_verified.Frontend settings modal: Code verified - has Edit Categories option that navigates to onboarding
features_verified.Frontend new user routing: Code verified - routes users without completed onboarding to /onboarding
